title: pouteria calcarea
intro: Pouteria calcarea, also known as the yellow ironwood, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Sapotaceae. The medicinal properties of Pouteria calcarea include its rich source of flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for cardiovascular diseases and other conditions. Herbal preparations of Pouteria calcarea often involve boiling the bark or roots in water to create a tea that is consumed for its medicinal properties.
